title: More RPG Series - Thermoo Compat
description: Datapack for Modpack Devs. This Datapack adds some of the More RPG Series Content  to the Thermoo Tags (Frostiful & Scorchful).
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ydkIYaHR/images/3313c7f42d522ec2033422eb6af587f49bd33996.png)

### 🚨Required Mods
- [Thermoo](https://modrinth.com/mod/thermoo)
- [Frostiful (Optional)](https://modrinth.com/mod/frostiful)
- [Scorchful (Optional)](https://modrinth.com/mod/scorchful)

This optional datapack was mainly created for Modpack Devs. It adds some of the More RPG Classes armor-sets and Loot & Exploreto drinks & foods the Thermoo Mod Tags, which adds functionallity for the Frostiful & Scorchful Mod.

**The following armors gets added to the tags with this datapack:**
- [Berserker Class](https://modrinth.com/mod/berserker-rpg-class/settings/description)
- [Witcher](https://modrinth.com/project/witcher-rpg-class 'Title') (Ursine School Armor)
- [Archers Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers-expansion) (Tundra Hunter Armor)
![Berserker Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ydkIYaHR/images/8c20159d9ea20ad4271afbdb5ffa1d6b7fac12dd.png)

**The following drinks gets added to the tags with this datapack:**
- LNE Buff Drinks, Soups and Stews
![Espresso](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ydkIYaHR/images/27fe74722cc8dca8c3a66d5e0b2360390a892d33.png)
